checks.name: runtime_config
checks.summary: The runtime config exists and validates against the repo schema.
checks.guidance: Keep the runtime config aligned with the checked-in YAML template.

checks.name: skill_install
checks.summary: The deep-gvr skill bundle is installed in the Hermes skills directory.
checks.guidance: Re-run bash scripts/install.sh if the installed bundle is stale.

checks.name: orchestrator_backend
checks.summary: The runtime is configured to use the shipped Hermes orchestrator backend.
checks.guidance: Use Hermes for the delegated execution path, or switch to codex_local when you want the native Codex backend.

checks.name: codex_cli
checks.summary: Codex CLI is not required for the selected non-Codex backend.
checks.guidance: Install Codex only if you also want the Codex-native backend or Codex-local operator surfaces on this machine.

checks.name: hermes_cli
checks.summary: Hermes CLI is not installed or not available on PATH.
checks.guidance: Install Hermes Agent and ensure the hermes binary is on PATH before operator use.

checks.name: provider_credentials
checks.summary: At least one explicitly configured provider is missing its expected environment credential.
checks.guidance: Export the expected provider API key before using the configured route on the selected backend.

checks.name: analysis_adapter_families
checks.summary: One or more OSS analysis adapter families are missing local Python dependencies.
checks.guidance: Install the missing OSS analysis libraries before using those adapter families in live operator runs.

checks.name: tier2_backend
checks.summary: The selected Tier 2 backend (local) is ready in this environment.
checks.guidance: Use scripts/run_capability_probes.py --config ${DEEP_GVR_HOME:-${HERMES_HOME:-~/.hermes}/deep-gvr}/config.yaml when backend settings change.

checks.name: tier3_transport
checks.summary: Tier 3 is disabled in the runtime config, so the configured formal backend transport is not required for operator use.
checks.guidance: Verify the configured formal backend before enabling Tier 3 for operator use.

checks.name: publication_manifest
checks.summary: The checked-in publication manifest matches the current repo metadata and release surface.
checks.guidance: Use the manifest as the publication bundle source for GitHub and agentskills.io release work.

checks.name: codex_plugin_surface
checks.summary: The checked-in Codex plugin bundle and local marketplace metadata match the repo surface.
checks.guidance: Use bash scripts/install_codex.sh --plugin-root <dir> to export a standalone local plugin marketplace root when needed.

checks.name: codex_automation_surface
checks.summary: The checked-in Codex automation catalog and templates match the repo surface.
checks.guidance: Use uv run python scripts/export_codex_automations.py --output-root <dir> or bash scripts/install_codex.sh --automation-root <dir> to export a reviewable automation bundle for Codex.

checks.name: codex_review_qa_surface
checks.summary: The checked-in Codex review/QA catalog and prompt templates match the repo surface.
checks.guidance: Use uv run python scripts/export_codex_review_qa.py --output-root <dir> or bash scripts/install_codex.sh --review-qa-root <dir> to export a reviewable Codex review/QA bundle.

checks.name: codex_subagent_surface
checks.summary: The checked-in Codex subagent catalog and prompt templates match the repo surface.
checks.guidance: Use uv run python scripts/export_codex_subagents.py --output-root <dir> or bash scripts/install_codex.sh --subagents-root <dir> to export a reviewable Codex subagent bundle.

checks.name: codex_ssh_devbox_surface
checks.summary: The checked-in Codex SSH/devbox catalog and prompt templates match the repo surface.
checks.guidance: Use uv run python scripts/export_codex_ssh_devbox.py --output-root <dir> or bash scripts/install_codex.sh --ssh-devbox-root <dir> to export a reviewable remote-operator bundle for Codex.

checks.name: release_metadata
checks.summary: The checked-in changelog and release tag policy match the current project version.
checks.guidance: Render release notes directly from CHANGELOG.md when cutting a tagged release.

checks.name: auto_improve_policy
checks.summary: The published release policy ships with auto_improve disabled by default.
checks.guidance: Only opt in after running uv run python scripts/evaluate_auto_improve.py --output /tmp/deep-gvr-auto-improve/report.json and reviewing the report.
